name: RightForMe Product Board
description: Product planning board for RightForMe. Trello captures product intent; GitHub tracks engineering execution.

cards.name: Capture build-in-public post ideas
cards.description:
## User Problem
We need a visible learning trail that explains what is being built and why.

## Target User
Mike and future followers of the project.

## Proposed Outcome
Maintain a list of short post ideas tied to shipped features and lessons learned.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Each shipped feature has a post idea
- [ ] Notes explain the product decision
- [ ] Notes explain the learning moment

## MVP Relevance
Supports the public learning journey.

## Learning in Public Note
The product story is part of the product.

cards.name: Improve analyzer output quality
cards.description:
## User Problem
The first analyzer works, but the output still feels like a prototype and relies too much on keyword overlap.

## Target User
A job seeker considering a role outside their comfort zone.

## Proposed Outcome
Make the analysis clearer, more honest, and more useful for deciding whether to apply.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Output includes a clearer role summary
- [ ] Output separates fit evidence from stretch areas
- [ ] Recommendation language is specific and honest
- [ ] Strategy explains how to position adjacent experience

## MVP Relevance
This is core to v0.1.

## Learning in Public Note
Show how product language changes when the goal is healthy stretch, not blind confidence.

cards.name: Add sample job descriptions for testing
cards.description:
## User Problem
We need repeatable examples to test whether analyzer changes improve quality.

## Target User
The builder and future contributors.

## Proposed Outcome
Create a small set of realistic sample roles and candidate backgrounds.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] At least three job samples exist
- [ ] At least three background samples exist
- [ ] Samples cover obvious fit, healthy stretch, and save-for-later scenarios

## MVP Relevance
Improves testing and product judgment.

## Learning in Public Note
Testing product judgment requires realistic examples.

cards.name: Initial MVP prototype
cards.description:
## User Problem
We needed a small working product spine to prove the concept.

## Proposed Outcome
A static v0.1 analyzer that accepts a job description and optional background, then returns fit, stretch, evidence, gaps, and strategy.

## GitHub
Initial commit is on main.

## Learning in Public Note
The first build proves the product direction: distinguish bad fit from healthy stretch.

cards.name: Delivery workflow playbook
cards.description:
## User Problem
The project needs a repeatable professional workflow.

## Proposed Outcome
AGENTS.md defines Trello, GitHub Issues, branching, PRs, testing, and learning-in-public steps.

## GitHub
Merged through PR #2.

## Learning in Public Note
The process is part of the portfolio.
